name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Never Forget
body:
Honoring our heroes on 9/11 Today we honor the memory of the victims of the September 11th, 2001 terrorist attacks on our nation. As Americans, let's take a minute to remember that tragic day as we continue to maintain the values of this great country.Twenty years later, America remains vulnerable.Just last month, we were reminded of the cost of this struggle, as 13 more lives were lost due to a cowardly act of terrorism in Afghanistan. Our hearts and prayers will always go out to the men and women who have paid that price, and the loved ones they leave behind.When America said "Never Forget," we meant it.-Glenn Grothman | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-cjhlijd-yddjllujiu-r/)
---

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Never Forget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, twenty years ago to this day, 2,977 men and women tragically lost their lives. They represented all walks of life--the m
Peter,**Twenty years ago to this day, 2,977 men and women tragically lost their lives. They represented all walks of life--the melting pot of America. ** Despite the horrific terrorist attack, we remained strong and united. **We will always remember those who perished and we will always stand with the men and women who bravely rescued our fellow Americans.**

September 11, 2001, also showed how we are united as one nation under God. We stood together as Americans on that day and in the months and years that followed. **Let 's stand together again.**Never forget,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkhiuht-idtjvlhlh-r/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkhiuht-idtjvlhlh-y/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkhiuht-idtjvlhlh-j/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fkhiuht-l-i) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307061:Jss3UA2N7:m:1:3253819041:DB06A6DDE781D3F8D06C895F6735CB1C:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307061:Jss3UA2N7:m:1:3253819041:DB06A6DDE781D3F8D06C895F6735CB1C:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307061:Jss3UA2N7:m:1:3253819041:DB06A6DDE781D3F8D06C895F6735CB1C:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307061:Jss3UA2N7:m:1:3253819041:DB06A6DDE781D3F8D06C895F6735CB1C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307061:Jss3UA2N7:m:1:3253819041:DB06A6DDE781D3F8D06C895F6735CB1C:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307061:Jss3UA2N7:m:1:3253819041:DB06A6DDE781D3F8D06C895F6735CB1C:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

| | Derek, if we’re not careful, Donald Trump’s 2024 comeback will start in Virginia.

Just look at the numbers:

In 2020, Virginia voters came together and helped Joe Biden defeat Donald Trump by **ten points.**

But now, Terry’s opponent has been endorsed by Donald Trump three times. Polls show he’s within just **two points** of catching Terry McAuliffe, with one **even showing him AHEAD**.

We’re trending the wrong way, and we’ve got to do everything we can to turn this around.

**_[I’m asking you directly because this is important. Will you chip in to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign right now so we can stop Trumpism in its tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35630588/305648301/-2023814932?refcode=20210912.1_MW_9BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNhN2YyOS1jNTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-WvV1fcQmwMqo7eqb3b2Z2w8ZRChcpRYruTsOu-JfQ=)_**

Joe Biden’s win was only possible last year because of grassroots supporters helping out whenever and however they could.

Well, Derek, we’ve got to do that all again if we’re going to elect Terry McAuliffe this year.

_**Joe Biden made it perfectly clear when he campaigned for Terry in Virginia. Virginia is the next battle in the soul for America. If we elect Terry, we stop Donald Trump.**_

This will be the **_most competitive_** Senate race in 2022, friend. Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the gavel, and news outlets across the country from _CNN_ to _The Washington Post_ have reported that New Hampshire is one of the most likely Senate seats to flip. With top Republicans already spending millions on attack ads, it's critical that our campaign builds a solid foundation to fight back. That's why we're reaching out to ask if you can make an early investment in our campaign. **[Whether it's $5 or $10, any amount will go a long way in a race this important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35638491/305677854/-149339129?refcode=e20210912_investment&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzkzYjFkNS1kNTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8nKiz3fF_4TjPLqatxW5iKJv5mCFPxRrxT1GonlxXM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35638492/305677855/-149339129?refcode=e20210912_investment&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzkzYjFkNS1kNTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8nKiz3fF_4TjPLqatxW5iKJv5mCFPxRrxT1GonlxXM=)

Team, I want to take a moment to talk about Texas’ new extreme law that bans abortions after just six weeks.

This radical bill is clearly unconstitutional and a threat to women’s health and reproductive freedoms. And while I’m glad the Justice Department is taking steps to challenge and stop the law -- we can’t sit by and wait for legal action.

This is not just about Texas, Pennsylvania lawmakers are planning to introduce a similar bill -- and if Republicans retake the House, you can count on extremists like anti-choice Congressman Scott Perry introducing a similar bill at the federal level.

**There are only 5 seats in Congress that separate our Democratic majority from a Republican takeover, and the top one is Scott Perry (PA-10) right here in central PA. Unlike other extremists like Marjorie Taylor Green, Matt Gaetz, and Jim Jordan, Scott Perry is uniquely vulnerable -- he can be defeated.** We must defeat Perry and flip this seat to ensure we keep our Democratic majority and protect freedom of choice.

subject: 🚨Big merger alert (plus matching gifts)!
body:
In honor of this badass new alliance, all donations will be MATCHED until MIDNIGHT. Hurry!

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35644202/305688298/1300596418?refcode=210912_FR_mergertrio_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDVhYmVlLWRiMTMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fS9v7yqjjuldnhTp5KlivQhUeNQ1pFLv7YUW89hMkjQ=)

Peter,

**We have an exciting announcement for you all today:_Pay Your Interns_ is now officially merged as a subsidiary PAC to _Barrier to Entry!_**

Many of you already know that these two are sister PACs, founded by the same trifecta of young progressive women seeking to increase equitability and inclusivity in the professional world and in Democratic politics.

While _Pay Your Interns_ will remain a critical individual branch of _Barrier to Entry_ that specifically focuses on eliminating unpaid internships and unethical labor practices, we feel that this unification will further strengthen the overall goal of increasing transparency and accountability when it comes to fair jobs and equal opportunities in the progressive political space.

_Barrier to Entry’s_ mission has always been to dismantle the socioeconomic barriers that keep working-class folks from getting ahead in professional and political sectors. And now, with _Pay Your Interns_ officially joining us, we hope to ensure that there is both dignity and inclusion in all labor -- including interns, campaign staff, political candidates, and beyond.

**Together, we are stronger. And united, we can build both a government and a business environment that truly reflect ALL people. But we can’t do any of it without you fighting alongside us.**

[**So today, in honor of this newly-established alliance between _Barrier to Entry_ and _Pay Your Interns_ , all donations will be MATCHED \-- but only until MIDNIGHT! Please rush a contribution right away to DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT and celebrate this monumental partnership with us clean_body: In honor of this badass new alliance, all donations will be MATCHED until MIDNIGHT. Hurry! | | | = Peter, We have an exciting announcement for you all today:Pay Your Interns is now officially merged as a subsidiary PAC to Barrier to Entry! Many of you already know that these two are sister PACs, founded by the same trifecta of young progressive women seeking to increase equitability and inclusivity in the professional world and in Democratic politics. While Pay Your Interns will remain a critical individual branch of Barrier to Entry that specifically focuses on eliminating unpaid internships and unethical labor practices, we feel that this unification will further strengthen the overall goal of increasing transparency and accountability when it comes to fair jobs and equal opportunities in the progressive political space. Barrier to Entry’s mission has always been to dismantle the socioeconomic barriers that keep working-class folks from getting ahead in professional and political sectors. And now, with Pay Your Interns officially joining us, we hope to ensure that there is both dignity and inclusion in all labor -- including interns, campaign staff, political candidates, and beyond. Together, we are stronger. And united, we can build both a government and a business environment that truly reflect ALL people. But we can’t do any of it without you fighting alongside us. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= __= __= __= __= We can’t wait to see this coalition continue to build momentum, and we hope you’re as pumped up about this merger as we are. Thanks for being a part of this fight with us! Eden, Megan, and Jimena ********** ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: FWD: Roe v. Wade effectively overturned in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,
---
I wish I didn't have to follow up on my earlier email (below), but what just happened in Texas should compel each and every last person reading this email to take action. Truly, Friend, I am counting on you.
As you're likely aware, under the cover of darkness, a majority of conservative Supreme Court Justices - three of them appointed by Donald Trump and confirmed by a Republican-controlled Senate - allowed the most restrictive abortion ban in the country to move forward in Texas.
As a result, the precedent of Roe v. Wade has effectively been overturned in Texas. Access to safe, legal abortion is now illegal after six weeks of gestation, before many women even know they are pregnant. There are zero exceptions for rape or incest. In fact, in a remark beyond ludicrous even for a leader in the Republican Party, Texas Gov. Greg Abbott claimed he had the power to rid his state of all rapists so that nobody would need to seek out an abortion.
Texas is actively violating human and constitutional rights while also putting people in harm's way. Dozens of other conservative-led states have now vowed to follow suit. **Inaction at the federal level is no longer an option. Please, even if you 've spoken up already, speak out again and again until we win: [Sign my petition to urge Congress to pass my bill, the Women's Health Protection Act, to guarantee nationwide access to abortion care.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1072-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1072-su-nd)**
Roe v. Wade is on life support. Congress must take steps to codify the right to an abortion into law, but we need major grassroots activism to make it happen. Thank you for adding your voice to this urgent fight.
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Wed, Sep 1, 2021
Subject: Roe v. Wade effectively overturned - unless we act now

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=SrXcXOa%2B3%2FDcRvH%2FvHIUwScWJ7dYESJQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I have disturbing and urgent news to share - and I'm counting on you to take action like never before:
**Today, because the Supreme Court failed to intervene, the Texas GOP 's extremist new abortion law goes into effect - and _Roe v. Wade_ will effectively have been overturned. The stakes couldn't be higher for women in Texas and across the country.**
Texas' radical and unconstitutional law will:
* Ban abortion beyond six weeks of pregnancy - before most women can know or even be aware that they _are_ pregnant.
* Create a vigilante justice system that allows **anyone in the _entire country_** to personally sue Texas health clinics, doctors, nurses, clinic administrators - just about anyone who helps a woman exercise her constitutional reproductive rights. Including a friend or family member who drives her to the clinic or gives her financial assistance. And each of these individuals can be sued for $10,000 and legal expenses.

There is a clear-cut pathway at the federal level that could have blocked this extremist legislation in Texas and prevent anything like it from taking hold across the country:
That's the Women's Health Protection Act, a bill I introduced, which would guarantee a woman's right to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. **This new law would enshrine a woman 's right to choose at the federal level - and ensure it's protected, no matter what the courts or right-wing state lawmakers try to do.**
Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that we are on the precipice of a monstrous violation of fundamental human rights if this Texas anti-women law survives its legal challenges and remains in effect. **That 's why I am once again asking 2,500 members of this team to sign on to my petition to protect women's reproductive health. Time is of the essence, so please add your name immediately.**
**[Sign on now to urge Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act so we can defend women's reproductive health.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1072-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1072-su-nd)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1072-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1072-su-nd)
If we do nothing, Texas is only the beginning. Our country could return to dark days where every single woman's personal decision about when to have a child is controlled by the government - back to the days where abortion care was driven underground and made unsafe.
As we've seen with GOP-led attacks on voting rights, when extremist laws take hold in one state, they can spread like wildfire to others. Texas' sickening new maneuver will be a model for anti-choice legislators across the country, and that's why action at the federal level to block these extremist laws is so necessary.
I will fight with everything I have to prevent that from happening, but I need you to help me pass this vital legislation through Congress. **[Please, can I count on you to sign my petition now urging Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? I'm counting on 2,500 team members to sign on before midnight to protect abortion access.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1072-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1072-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2NgLCcSxzngRAsUT62wHDCcWJ7dYESJQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

| | [**_Starting tomorrow I’ll be joining my colleagues in the Legislature for a Special Session. My time to fundraise is running short, so I’m launching a last-minute $10,000 goal to keep my campaign funded as my work picks up. I’m going to explain why hitting this goal is so important, but if you’re short on time will you chip in $12 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35645220/305692074/1129282168?refcode=20210912_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODA1M2Y2Ny1lMDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B56K32I4_thx8iPK4YS7JD8sUsB1FxqMcaSsoZBzCBs=)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: re: the power of representation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I was 26 before I ever saw an African American woman presiding in a courtroom as a judge.
#

I was 26 before I ever saw an African American woman presiding in a courtroom as a judge. It was Justice Pat Timmons Goodson in Fayetteville, and that moment changed my life.
That is the power of representation. When our elected leaders reflect the diversity of our state and nation, we get better outcomes for everyone.
Right now, the Senate has zero African American women, but we can change that and help bring meaningful change for our families.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to my campaign today to help us win this race in North Carolina? Our state desperately needs new leadership in the Senate, and you can trust that I will always fight for justice and for the people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35646595/305698658/1741212721?refcode2=4458408b-e313-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210912-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU4NDA4Yi1lMzEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Amya-aOPOBgkee9-932zO2_OblfP2Agjpyd1kys-zlA=)
There’s no doubt that we will face tough challenges and vicious attacks from Republicans who want to stop us.
I saw the lengths Mitch McConnell was willing to go to block Justice Timmons Goodson’s nomination to a federal court. He and his allies will do anything within their power to stop us from flipping North Carolina’s Senate seat.
That’s why it’s so important for us to be together in this campaign.
[**Please make a $3 donation to help us flip North Carolina and ensure there are diverse voices at the decision-making table in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35646596/305698659/1741212721?refcode2=4458408b-e313-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210912-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU4NDA4Yi1lMzEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Amya-aOPOBgkee9-932zO2_OblfP2Agjpyd1kys-zlA=)
I’m immensely grateful for all of the support we’ve received so far. If we keep working hard together, I know we’ll win in November.
\- Cheri Beasley

name: David Palmer
subject: What happened in Texas...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
On September 1st, SB8 became law in Texas — banning ALL abortions after six weeks without exceptions. And the Supreme Court, packed with Trump appointed justices, refused to even hear the case. For millions of people in Texas, their rights disappeared overnight. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35646797/305699762/-2098736573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY4N2Y2Zi1lNDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSKiB4tk6gNvV2_i9B-d5mypw13pR3_Phev5xGIiGp4=&emci=437a0a82-5612-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0a687f6f-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21852952) | Peter, **On September 1st, SB8 became law in Texas — banning ALL abortions after six weeks without exceptions.** And the Supreme Court, packed with Trump appointed justices, refused to even hear the case. For millions of people in Texas, their rights disappeared overnight. _**But on Thursday, Biden’s Justice Department announced that they are suing Texas over the unconstitutional abortion ban.**_ | | [SIGN THE PETITION TO PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35646798/305699763/1113531252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY4N2Y2Zi1lNDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSKiB4tk6gNvV2_i9B-d5mypw13pR3_Phev5xGIiGp4=&emci=437a0a82-5612-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0a687f6f-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21852952)
---
Attorney General Merrick Garland said that this law seeks "to prevent women from exercising their constitutional rights", and is “clearly unconstitutional under longstanding Supreme Court precedent".
He’s right, Peter. A person’s right to an abortion should not be up for discussion. Their health care decisions should be between them and their physician — not between them and GOP lawmakers.
People have the right to a safe and legal abortion. And nothing should stand in their way. If you believe in codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law so these rights are never taken away again, [_**will you sign our petition?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35646799/305699764/1113531252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY4N2Y2Zi1lNDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSKiB4tk6gNvV2_i9B-d5mypw13pR3_Phev5xGIiGp4=&emci=437a0a82-5612-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0a687f6f-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21852952)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35647376/305701834/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210912_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQ1YWRjMS1lNjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzA4rWyzU1DQ7UlUcYbcG9qNU9WCoK3GRu4y9VnPPnM=&emci=7d58e000-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d2d5adc1-e613-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Nearly half of students who start higher education don’t finish. That’s not okay, folks. We put so much time and energy into sending students _to_ college. Now we need to focus on what’s equally important — making sure they get _through_ it. That’s where my _College Completion Fund Act_ comes in. This legislation would establish a first-of-its-kind fund that would give colleges and universities the resources to support evidence-based practices around student retention, completion, and success. It would make sure students have the resources to pursue _and_ achieve a quality higher education. This is about more than hanging a degree on a wall. Finishing college is a _huge_ part of unlocking long-term career success and earning more. [**So I’m asking, folks: Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my _College Completion Fund Act_? It would be a huge step toward ensuring more students graduate and unlock long-term career success.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35647377/305701835/-530423734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210912_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQ1YWRjMS1lNjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzA4rWyzU1DQ7UlUcYbcG9qNU9WCoK3GRu4y9VnPPnM=&emci=7d58e000-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d2d5adc1-e613-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045) | [SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35647378/305701837/-530423734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210912_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQ1YWRjMS1lNjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzA4rWyzU1DQ7UlUcYbcG9qNU9WCoK3GRu4y9VnPPnM=&emci=7d58e000-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d2d5adc1-e613-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
The _College Completion Fund Act_ would make sure under-resourced schools and all students get the support they need.
Colleges and universities will receive resources to address barriers to student success. That includes academic support services like career coaching and peer counseling, and direct student support through mental health services, child care, transportation, emergency financial assistance, and food and housing.
**[This legislation could help transform lives and set students on a successful career path. That’s why I’m asking you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor to show your support:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35647379/305701841/-530423734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210912_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQ1YWRjMS1lNjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzA4rWyzU1DQ7UlUcYbcG9qNU9WCoK3GRu4y9VnPPnM=&emci=7d58e000-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d2d5adc1-e613-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)**
[SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35647382/305701847/-530423734?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210912_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmQ1YWRjMS1lNjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RzA4rWyzU1DQ7UlUcYbcG9qNU9WCoK3GRu4y9VnPPnM=&emci=7d58e000-e413-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d2d5adc1-e613-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)

—Martin

body:
Clinics are canceling appointments, many Texans are leaving the state in search of reproductive healthcare, and some are refusing to talk to friends and family. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35648037/305703956/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYyMDFkYy1lOTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym1cSwEHg-9THFgvsoFslELPovtwNgNbSj_14GfS4Xw=)
Friend,

Although completely unconstitutional, the Texas GOP's so-called "heartbeat law" (Senate Bill 8) has been in effect for over a week now. Clinics are canceling appointments, and many "will be forced to shutter even if the law is reversed."

It's clear that deputizing Texans to go after those seeking reproductive healthcare makes this difficult to fight in the courts. Nothing like this has been done before:

1\. It incentivizes any private individual to sue reproductive healthcare providers, anyone seeking reproductive health care, or anyone who helps them. The plaintiff doesn't need any connection to the case.

2\. If the plaintiff wins, the courts are required to award a minimum of $10,000 paid by the person who violated the law.

3\. It also bans plaintiffs from being ordered to pay defendants' legal fees even when the plaintiff loses the case. There are no repercussions for those bringing lawsuits, making Texans prime for legal harassment and financial ruin.

4\. Multiple parties can bring lawsuits against the same healthcare provider, repeatedly, -- making them easy targets.

5\. These civil lawsuits can be brought anywhere in the state and can't be moved without agreement from both parties, subjecting defendants to travel to remote areas.

Despite the facts, it's easy to lose sight of how this affects our lives. Clinics are canceling appointments, many Texans are leaving the state in search of reproductive healthcare, and some are refusing to talk to friends and family.

**With no exception for rape or incest, this is not just intentionally cruel, but completely out of line.** We MUST break the GOP's ironclad grip on our state, and our campaign is doubling down. We're even more energized to generate higher turnout than we've ever seen before.

**Donna is doing her part in one of Texas' two new "likely Democratic" congressional districts. We're building on our success from last year when we knocked on over 50,000 doors. But no one person can do it alone, and that's where you come in:**

[**Will you chip in an urgent $3 to close the $8,791 gap on our end-of-week goal? We came up a bit short and need to catch up in order to prepare for the next stage of this campaign. Any amount helps us build our grassroots team to turn Texas blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35648038/305703957/77586780?refcode=em-91221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYyMDFkYy1lOTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym1cSwEHg-9THFgvsoFslELPovtwNgNbSj_14GfS4Xw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35648039/305703959/77586780?refcode=em-91221-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYyMDFkYy1lOTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym1cSwEHg-9THFgvsoFslELPovtwNgNbSj_14GfS4Xw=)

* He **WITHDREW** **American troops** before evacuating our citizens... leaving **10,000 Americans stranded** behind enemy lines.

* And just when you think it couldn't get any worse...

...now, he has **American BLOOD** **on his hands** , after a brutal terrorist attack on Kabul Airport left **dozens of Afghan allies and U.S. marines dead or injured.**

Joe Biden won't resign on his own. **But it 's time his Cabinet does what's right for the American people.** _**[Sign the petition to DEMAND the Cabinet REMOVE Joe Biden from office under the 25th Amendment>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307194:JJZ1m12N7:m:1:3253819041:D94F563BB0947E2EDE1A56055E8931E5:r "Sign the

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I’ll be the 50th vote to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It’s the filibuster or voting rights
#

Folks,
If Republicans have made anything crystal clear, it's that they will stop at nothing to make it harder for working people to vote (and vote them out).
That's why it's so absurd to me that we have so-called Democrats in the Senate floundering over whether to ditch the filibuster or wait around for the GOP to have a change of heart.
It's the filibuster or voting rights. Either we get rid of this Jim Crow relic, or we continue to let Republicans choose their electorate.
That's not a difficult choice for me, folks. I'll be the 50th vote Democrats need in the U.S. Senate to finally abolish the filibuster and pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
**But I need your help to get there. With our next federally mandated fundraising deadline coming up this month, it's so important that we stay on top of our fundraising goal.**
[Could you please make a $3 donation today to keep our momentum strong and grow our movement for voting rights? Each donation makes a huge difference in the long-term success of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35649809/305710618/-353695395?refcode2=4a333e76-ed13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210912-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTMzM2U3Ni1lZDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h02X--dxaF2-tI1LfuGOr7puTwWWP1s13bEWgl93wQk=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35649810/305710619/-353695395?refcode2=4a333e76-ed13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210912-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTMzM2U3Ni1lZDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h02X--dxaF2-tI1LfuGOr7puTwWWP1s13bEWgl93wQk=)**

Thank you,
Malcolm

clean_body: It’s the filibuster or voting rights Folks, If Republicans have made anything crystal clear, it's that they will stop at nothing to make it harder for working people to vote (and vote them out). That's why it's so absurd to me that we have so-called Democrats in the Senate floundering over whether to ditch the filibuster or wait around for the GOP to have a change of heart. It's the filibuster or voting rights. Either we get rid of this Jim Crow relic, or we continue to let Republicans choose their electorate. That's not a difficult choice for me, folks. I'll be the 50th vote Democrats need in the U.S. Senate to finally abolish the filibuster and pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But I need your help to get there. With our next federally mandated fundraising deadline coming up this month, it's so important that we stay on top of our fundraising goal. = = I believe our democracy is worth fighting for, and I’m so grateful to have you with me in this fight. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: More than 125 House progressives, moderates, and frontline lawmakers support this. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
What we’re asking for here isn’t unreasonable.
#
Peter, I’ve been fighting for Medicare for All for years — and you better believe that fight will continue until we guarantee health care to every person as a human right.
**But right now, we have a real opportunity to expand Medicare coverage by simply lowering the Medicare eligibility age to 60.** That would mean at least 23 million more Americans are finally able to get the care they need and deserve.
Good policy doesn’t have to be hard. We just have to do what's right. Lowering the Medicare eligibility age is popular, smart, and effective. [**If you agree, add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Improving Medicare Coverage Act — let’s show everyone that the momentum is behind us to get this done.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210912-624&t=1&akid=624%2E420207%2EMaFAIj)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210912-624&t=2&akid=624%2E420207%2EMaFAIj)**
I feel like a broken record saying this sometimes, but what we’re asking for here isn’t unreasonable. **President Biden proposed lowering the eligibility age on the campaign trail, and a recent poll showed that Americans — Democrats and Republicans alike — support it too.**
The same is true inside Congress: More than 125 House progressives, moderates, and frontline lawmakers facing tough reelection fights support lowering the eligibility age because it’s good policy — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them.
Congress and President Biden should immediately deliver for the people by prioritizing the expansion and improvement of Medicare in the upcoming Build Back Better package. [**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Improving Medicare Coverage Act, and join the fight to get health care to millions of additional Americans.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210912-624&t=3&akid=624%2E420207%2EMaFAIj)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210912-624&t=4&akid=624%2E420207%2EMaFAIj)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210912-624-footer&t=5&refcode2=624_420207_MaFAIj&akid=624%2E420207%2EMaFAIj)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Friend,

This is a longer email about the very real impacts of climate change and the wildland fires raging across the North State. Please read it, then consider supporting my campaign for Congress.

Here's a photo of a campaign stop I recently made in Greenville:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650445/305712224/-109236511?refcode=em-91221-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzI3ODhhMS1mMDEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1jl44FfqUN1iyyKU35p4T5m5pT7J0dQh5gmpZy0rscM=)
**This scene may look normal, but it's not. Sadly, this photo was taken just before the family lost their home to the Dixie Fire when the town burned to the ground.**

The Dixie Fire is well on its way to becoming the largest wildfire in California's history. It's burned more than 914,655 acres and is 58% contained.

We're no strangers to the consequences of our climate crisis. My own brother lost his home to the Carr Fire in 2018, which raged in Shasta and Trinity Counties.

This is a major reason why I'm in this race. We don't lack solutions to wildfires -- we lack the political willpower and bipartisan resolve to implement them. We need to elect leaders who get to work solving these problems. Our current Congressman Doug LaMalfa has proven unwilling to do this.

**The North State is ready for change, but I'll need support to get to Washington so I can make a difference.**

Thanks for reading, and thanks in advance for any support.

Max

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Air quality.
body:
Smoke is particularly risky for young kids. I watch some of them struggle with asthma and other complications from climate change and our deteriorating environment. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650668/305712811/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjI2NDVkZS1mMTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lcy_by19HfmB9ctjc-wTRsU2V5_8QgzPQ7vcRTjQ6j8=)
Here's an update on our air quality in the Central Valley, friend.

As wildfires rage across our state, you may have seen the health advisories telling folks to stay in doors. The impact of smoke and air pollution on our kids can't be understated, especially with the Delta variant continuing to surge.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650669/305712812/-686739743?refcode=em-91221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjI2NDVkZS1mMTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lcy_by19HfmB9ctjc-wTRsU2V5_8QgzPQ7vcRTjQ6j8=)
_Our skies are looking grim these days (photo credit: Kern Valley Sun)._
I can't help but think of the kids I teach. Smoke is very harmful for them -- especially during recess. I've watched some struggle with asthma and other complications due to climate change and our deteriorating environment.

It's not just from fires. According to the _American Lung Association,_ three of the ten smoggiest cities in the entire country are right here in California’s Central Valley. It breaks my heart, but more than anything it makes me mad. We need policies that address our air quality issues, but time and time again crooked politicians like Kevin McCarthy block these policies and deny they exist.

**I believe in science.** I believe in reducing carbon emissions. We deserve better than McCarthy who would rather defend the furthest-right wing members of his party like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene than work on this issue.

That's a big part of why I'm running to replace Kevin McCarthy and why I'm asking:

**[If you are ready to be part of the solution, chip in $3 to my grassroots campaign today. The future for all of our kids and grandchildren is on the line, and we can't waste time with someone like Kevin McCarthy who refuses to give these issues the attention they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650670/305712813/-686739743?refcode=em-91221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjI2NDVkZS1mMTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lcy_by19HfmB9ctjc-wTRsU2V5_8QgzPQ7vcRTjQ6j8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650671/305712814/-686739743?refcode=em-91221-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjI2NDVkZS1mMTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lcy_by19HfmB9ctjc-wTRsU2V5_8QgzPQ7vcRTjQ6j8=)

clean_body: Smoke is particularly risky for young kids. I watch some of them struggle with asthma and other complications from climate change and our deteriorating environment. | = Here's an update on our air quality in the Central Valley, friend. As wildfires rage across our state, you may have seen the health advisories telling folks to stay in doors. The impact of smoke and air pollution on our kids can't be understated, especially with the Delta variant continuing to surge. = Our skies are looking grim these days (photo credit: Kern Valley Sun). I can't help but think of the kids I teach. Smoke is very harmful for them -- especially during recess. I've watched some struggle with asthma and other complications due to climate change and our deteriorating environment. It's not just from fires. According to the American Lung Association, three of the ten smoggiest cities in the entire country are right here in California’s Central Valley. It breaks my heart, but more than anything it makes me mad. We need policies that address our air quality issues, but time and time again crooked politicians like Kevin McCarthy block these policies and deny they exist. I believe in science. I believe in reducing carbon emissions. We deserve better than McCarthy who would rather defend the furthest-right wing members of his party like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene than work on this issue. That's a big part of why I'm running to replace Kevin McCarthy and why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Marisa Wood Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. name: Seth Moulton
subject: My reflections on September 11th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650772/305713188/-1416185584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I4YzM1ZS1mMjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSVJRG9p8iRjHtaqZ4vP4KCoUMRhl9dZurht0CFvmBk=&emci=200428c7-2f13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5cb8c35e-f213-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) Twenty years may seem like a long time, but for the survivors of 9/11 and those who lost loved ones on that day, it can feel like just yesterday. We all have a certain way in which this terrible tragedy has affected our lives. Looking back, I think not just about September 11th, but about September 12th: how just after this unspeakable tragedy that none of us could have imagined, all of us in America came together. We came together to help the victims. To volunteer. To try to make the world a little bit better place. One of the worst days in America’s history brought out the best in the American people. The best way to preserve the memory and legacy of the lives we lost on September 11th is to uphold the spirit of unity that Americans demonstrated on September 12th, and remain committed to protecting our country, so attacks like this never happen again. This anniversary is particularly important not only because it marks year twenty, but also because for the first time in two decades we are no longer fighting a war in Afghanistan. As a young American in the 1990s, I remember people wondering whether our country's rising generation would be willing to serve and sacrifice as prior generations of Americans had. Things were going well before the attack. Life was pretty easy. Well, no one asks that question anymore. Immediately after the attacks and in the years since, hundreds of thousands of young Americans have answered the call to serve, many fighting over and over again in the longest war in our nation’s history, and others saving lives right here at home in the face of violence and the greatest deadly pandemic in over a century. America has once again proven itself a nation “of the people,” a nation of volunteers, a nation made strong by those willing to serve. Just a couple of weeks ago, the last American troops left Afghanistan having accomplished our initial mission: Osama Bin Laden is dead and there has not been a terrorist attack against the United States homeland that has emanated from Afghanistan for the last 20 years. Yet the work goes on. Many veterans today are working to relocate their Afghan partners across this country after a withdrawal that left too many behind. So we also remember the tireless work and sacrifice of our troops, including the 13 brave service members we lost at the hands of ISIS a few weeks ago. **Sgt. Johanny Rosario Pichardo
Sgt. Nicole Gee
Staff Sgt. Darin Hoover
Cpl. Hunter Lopez
Cpl. Daegan Page
Cpl. Humberto Sanchez
Lance Cpl. David Espinoza
Lance Cpl. Jared Schmitz
Lance Cpl. Rylee McCollum
Lance Cpl. Dylan Merola
Lance Cpl. Kareem Nikoui
Navy Corpsman Maxton Soviak
Staff Sgt. Ryan C. Knauss ** These Americans risked their lives to uphold America’s highest values. Their sacrifices saved thousands of our Afghan partners from a certain death sentence. They are heroes. And their legacies will live on in the thousands of men, women, and children who will live out their lives in peace. -Seth | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650773/305713189/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I4YzM1ZS1mMjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSVJRG9p8iRjHtaqZ4vP4KCoUMRhl9dZurht0CFvmBk=&emci=200428c7-2f13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5cb8c35e-f213-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650774/305713190/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I4YzM1ZS1mMjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSVJRG9p8iRjHtaqZ4vP4KCoUMRhl9dZurht0CFvmBk=&emci=200428c7-2f13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5cb8c35e-f213-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650775/305713191/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I4YzM1ZS1mMjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSVJRG9p8iRjHtaqZ4vP4KCoUMRhl9dZurht0CFvmBk=&emci=200428c7-2f13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5cb8c35e-f213-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35650776/305713192/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I4YzM1ZS1mMjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSVJRG9p8iRjHtaqZ4vP4KCoUMRhl9dZurht0CFvmBk=&emci=200428c7-2f13-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5cb8c35e-f213-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769)

| | Y’all, I don’t want to take up too much of your Sunday afternoon and we’ve been emailing you a lot lately, so I’ll keep this quick. I just wanted to take a minute to explain why these emails matter. I got into email fundraising because I was tired of seeing politicians and organizations beholden to wealthy corporations and special interest groups. **Email is one of the fastest ways to grow a strong grassroots fundraising network and hand political power back to folks like you, Derek.** Grassroots supporters are how we’re going to power our movement to win in November and keep Trump’s handpicked candidate, Glenn Youngkin, out of the Governor’s office. Whether it’s $5 or $100, your contribution has the power to send a message to Trump and his right wing allies here in Virginia. **We’re only $7,253 away from hitting that $28,000 goal Andrew set earlier this week. When I walk into our Monday morning meeting I want to be able to show him and the rest of the DPVA team that our grassroots supporters are showing up and making their voices heard. clean_body: Just give me a moment to explain | | | Y’all, I don’t want to take up too much of your Sunday afternoon and we’ve been emailing you a lot lately, so I’ll keep this quick. I just wanted to take a minute to explain why these emails matter. I got into email fundraising because I was tired of seeing politicians and organizations beholden to wealthy corporations and special interest groups. Email is one of the fastest ways to grow a strong grassroots fundraising network and hand political power back to folks like you, Derek. Grassroots supporters are how we’re going to power our movement to win in November and keep Trump’s handpicked candidate, Glenn Youngkin, out of the Governor’s office. Whether it’s $5 or $100, your contribution has the power to send a message to Trump and his right wing allies here in Virginia. We’re only $7,253 away from hitting that $28,000 goal Andrew set earlier this week. When I walk into our Monday morning meeting I want to be able to show him and the rest of the DPVA team that our grassroots supporters are showing up and making their voices heard. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Supporters like you, Derek, are the reason we took the majority in 2019 and kicked Trump out of the White House in 2020, and you’re the reason we’re going to beat Trump and his allies here in Virginia in 2021 and beyond. Talk soon, Rylie Cooper Democratic Party of Virginia = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This was the point in the last race where we broke through. And when I look back on it, it was this deadline in the 2020 races that put us on a path to victory.
#

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign in Arizona. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We have an important FEC fundraising deadline this month, and when it’s over we’re legally required to report how much money we’ve raised at this point in the campaign.
This was the moment in our last race where we really broke through. And my team says it was our success during this period that put us on a path to victory.
But right now, honestly, we’re starting out this month a lot slower than our last race — and even slower than last month. So, we need to pick up the pace or we risk falling behind. And the stakes of this race are too high to let that happen.
So, I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign today? We are running a mid-month fundraising drive to catch up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210912-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1302_6688874_bUqald&akid=1302%2E6688874%2EbUqald)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210912-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1302_6688874_bUqald&akid=1302%2E6688874%2EbUqald)**
Thank you again. When we win this race, know it was the action you took today that really helped. I mean that.
— Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1302%2E6688874%2EbUqald).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv7490j5pkpepmapvmq75dfa3arl97i5kf9r49ko_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5hm9or6cph2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zitj9kd06n0c97hja8usmv2lgsnkr6r8qlptcc4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5hm9or6cph2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zddj5j2ofpfp5fbjd8ku8085kdvqrr6rnbekhp68_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5hm9or6cph2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrcg97nn4f7iritgs62cqmapdpimqp575ipacqlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5hm9or6cph2bs)**
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze0974rspsuo6pihh9gdshij155n9n69barckljo_)

Peter, we’ve had a busy September so far:
* Election Day is less than two months away.

* My campaign launched our first ads of the general election.

* We’re leading in the polls ‐‐ but there’s still work to be done to ensure we uphold our Democratic majority.

* My extreme opponent proved reproductive health care is on the line ‐‐ suggesting our Commonwealth should adopt a Texas‐style abortion ban.

* And early voting begins in less than a week from today!

[**It’s clear, Peter: There’s a lot of work to do! But I can’t fight alone ‐‐ I need your support to keep up our strong momentum and beat back the wave of extreme Republican pushback. Can I count on your $3 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35652242/305718535/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20210912_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE4YTY1Yi1mNTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hlRLyV5mOkjNl0rqnD0HXb1q2sSiEJxp9OxPAacHs7k=) **** $20,000 END-OF-QUARTER ONLINE FUNDRAISING GOAL **** | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35652243/305718536/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20210912_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE4YTY1Yi1mNTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hlRLyV5mOkjNl0rqnD0HXb1q2sSiEJxp9OxPAacHs7k=)

Here's the deal --

Tim’s far-right opponents are out-of-touch millionaires calling for acts
of violence. We absolutely cannot let Ohio’s Senate seat fall into the

This race-baiting, fear-mongering, and frankly dangerous language has no
place in Ohio. None of Tim’s GOP opponents are fit to serve in the United
States Senate.

Tim will always put the wellbeing of our workers above all else. But
Republican mega-donors don’t want to see him win, so they’re pouring
millions into this race to defeat us.

body:
This isn’t looking good.

| **Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign!**
Message & data rates may apply.
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35653854/305723643/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI3YTVhNS1mYjEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvQJXsgT8qjKnOyN9P_CK9V6ZK50XJGBID-DTn-tTXs=)
_**Peter, we’re not too proud to beg.**_

body:
Thank you and have a great rest of your day!
#

We know it’s a Sunday, and we don’t want to take up too much of your weekend. So we’ll keep this quick.
Here’s the deal: each month, our team sets a fundraising goal. These numbers aren’t random — it’s what we need to raise to ensure Alex is prepared for anything the Republicans throw his way.
Because make no mistake, Republicans _are_ coming for us. They’d love nothing more than to replace Alex with a far-right, Trump-loving Republican who would hand control of the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell.
And as of right now, we’re pacing a little bit behind where we need to be to hit our monthly goal and ensure we have the resources to hold this seat. So we are asking for your help:

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Quick email about my September goal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
This year, i'm aiming to be the first candidate to qualify for the NRCC's "Young Guns" program. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=c9829d959b114a41b3d07cea01d1e24b&_e=tKQQ-LPgUxuMOjnOWo8yGBIK6ckNRkC60yGUwECX5cJ891x0C4rZI5_Sef28g3uvP2gVBKC-PF24ccHKB-pcwLzfkDUhA7df_c_zsSlZLPm8CrPh56rzxsxKYWu7qJk6HoU6t7hyVE8JkRt0MHx3J81FJPDdXhW9S0wTsQPwGyU9JrGANStUcUPisXTLP0htkM4txeyX321RD_Lf8cWZ4VNISU23ACQmqBCXkreyIuzaKSN926TWnCAlB4DowfcyD2OTKKV_R2BZrfUWtwMVB1NvCuwY42C4hq2BS4cAccRyvvCzUeEpRlIV4B73J6J93vWhi2fgAjigktbAhUQ_L9PzReDxVsztbyvF76mH0H3XJ4dhGTrD4b9JFoH72-Z1oqfDdbdF7jM6nC0wpI2HdUzz06bXKmTHZcou86BhkNEGJGAAAulMAQWORSQdbHpMhu4Krar8bfUpOxNHpPDNmQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=c9829d959b114a41b3d07cea01d1e24b&_e=tKQQ-LPgUxuMOjnOWo8yGBIK6ckNRkC60yGUwECX5cJ891x0C4rZI5_Sef28g3uvP2gVBKC-PF24ccHKB-pcwLzfkDUhA7df_c_zsSlZLPm8CrPh56rzxsxKYWu7qJk6HoU6t7hyVE8JkRt0MHx3J81FJPDdXhW9S0wTsQPwGyU9JrGANStUcUPisXTLP0htkM4txeyX321RD_Lf8cWZ4VNISU23ACQmqBCXkreyIuzaKSN926TWnCAlB4DowfcyKkR8g4x_nssE2Iy1HLjvYzSbk-r-D4phKECTITlodur1xQZqAcKOb88Yh6RmXxjiV747_WofE9k2MyMVZAkf55MotB4ZEtror9bDD3ve-iizXP5qcoJk0RpeHSEWhcUPSCmKacsSdMLJHsqGU44HorQsIDbzR4lptbYeNM2LnNaVD1kCOEPdG3okAkJ4Ec_ChtzxWjvwRgQTQue-6sSVdw%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: "it had to be said" Letter to my colleagues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- I recently sent a letter to my colleagues. Some are
happy about it. Some aren't.
But what I had to say had to be said. I hope
you'll take a few minutes to read my letter below.

"Dear Colleagues,
Since Dictator Joe Biden started phase 1 of
the Democrats' Communist take over of America yesterday and I
don't have a GOP Conference call on my calendar or even an email
in my inbox from leadership to stop this insanity, well I'm going
to be more direct than usual.
After all, I ran for Congress because when
Republicans controlled the House and Senate during the first two
years of Trump's presidency, they failed to deliver key issues
that were of utmost importance to Republican voters.
Broken campaign promises like:
Repealing Obamacare. Obamacare took my
families premium from $800 to over $2400.
Funding and building a border wall. Rs funded
all kinds of things for foreign countries but wouldn't build a
wall for Americans Defunding Sanctuary cities. Rs funded cities
who harbor illegal aliens.
Defunding Planned Parenthood. During the
first two years under Trump, Rs couldn't even defund that
disgusting abortion mill. No, they funded it.
That's the the one I really can't get over.
Remember that big Omnibus that Trump was so
angry over, the one that made us all furious?
Trump said never put another bill like this
across my desk and the Republicans gave our great President no
other option.
Republicans in Congress still don't
understand they lost the House in '18 because of their failures
to deliver what they campaigned on when they had the chance.
It can not be overstated that when
Republicans don't do what they say, they give no reason for
people to support them.
Along with millions of R voters, it was then
that I realized that if Republicans can't accomplish the most
important and easiest of campaign promises, when they held a
strong majority with a President like Trump, then they never
will. So I ran for Congress and here I am.
I give speeches to hundreds to thousands of
Republican voters every single week at home and all across the
country.
Our voters are fed up with Republicans in
Congress doing nothing to stop Dictator Joe Biden and the
outright destruction to our country.
You see, Republicans have a razor thin
minority in the House, only short a few votes.
This puts maximum pressure on Pelosi to
perform because she can't lose any votes, she needs her full
conference to pass bills.
And perform she does. I respect her for that.

Easy to perform when Republicans in the House
apply no real pressure even though Democrat bills are so
heinously un-American.
The Communist Democrat agenda could be beat
if my colleagues would legislate and take action the way many
give interviews on TV.
"But Marjorie you're just a freshman, you
don't understand how it's done."
Really?
The political pendulum has been swinging back
& forth between Rs & Ds for decades & we're $30 trillion in debt,
on the brink of communism, at risk of an economic collapse, and
being drug into full dependence on a global economy, and the
experienced Rs want to lecture me on how it's done?
You all should hear what your wealthiest most
successful donors are saying about you all and your lack of real
action while Democrats burn our country to the ground with a
dementia patient at the wheel.
It's beyond me that my Conference still
chooses to stay with the "messaging" and fundraising tactic to
take back the House and haven't comprehended what everyone else
on the planet knows to be true.
We won't have a Constitution or country left
to take back in '22 and definitely not in '24, if Republicans in
Congress don't get their asses in gear.
If Republicans are worth their weight in salt
then they better wake up and realize that they are leaving their
own with no confidence and feeling like they have to take matters
in their own hands.
Here is what must be done. Impeach Joe Biden.
The GOP Conference must come together with Articles of
Impeachment.
Spend as much money as it takes to apply
pressure on moderate Dems that know they will lose their seats if
they vote NO on impeachment.
For the Republicans who are rolling your eyes
saying it can't be done, that exact attitude is everything wrong
with our conference and your voters hate it.
I witnessed 10 Rs vote to impeach President
Trump and 11 Rs vote with Dems to kick me off committees.
Those traitorous type votes are exactly why
we fail and can't achieve our goals. Mock me and be angry at me
all you want, but it's business as usual that fails. And even our
enemies know it.
We may be short only a few votes but Biden
has burned his own voters and many in his party. We start with
Biden and go down the list. They are ALL responsible and ALL
impeachable.
Republicans must take action or face the
devastating reality of losing the trust and confidence of
Republican voters going into '22, and many are already on the
fence bc of the election and lack of real effort to fix it by
elected Rs.
Ever since I've been in Congress, I have
legislated exactly the way I talk on TV and in speeches. Minority
or majority should not matter. We should fight just as hard no
matter what. Do what we say we are going to do and fight no
matter what.
After all that's what the 13 American
soldiers did that Joe Biden killed.
They followed orders and did the job they
were told to do.
Why can't Republicans in Congress do the same
damn thing even if it looks hard?
Here is what doesn't work.
GOP Conference calls & meetings that are
nothing but altar calls for money.
Yes we have to raise money to take back the
House, but I will no longer be silent about half of the 20
"Republicans" that are benefactors of all that money for
re-election campaigns.
The top 20 Republicans that the NRCC fights
for contain 4 Republicans that voted to impeach Trump and 6 that
voted to kick me off committees. And 1 did both.
They call these moderate Republicans (or
really some are Democrats in disguise) "majority makers."
While yes we as a conference have to fight
harder to win and keep tight districts, we should not promote
weak Republicans to chairmanships, help pass their crappy bills,
and highlight them on Fox News all the time.
Those weak and moderate Republicans don't
reflect the values of our base or our party.
Why are they the ones diluting the decisions
and stopping the fight?
Hence back to where I started on why I ran
for Congress, Republican failures to do what they said they would
do.
Since I have paid all $175,000 of my
conference dues, I have every single right to talk about how the
money should be spent.
It should be spent on electing Republicans
