clean_body: Peter -- I recently sent a letter to my colleagues. Some are happy about it. Some aren't. But what I had to say had to be said. I hope you'll take a few minutes to read my letter below. "Dear Colleagues, Since Dictator Joe Biden started phase 1 of the Democrats' Communist take over of America yesterday and I don't have a GOP Conference call on my calendar or even an email in my inbox from leadership to stop this insanity, well I'm going to be more direct than usual. After all, I ran for Congress because when Republicans controlled the House and Senate during the first two years of Trump's presidency, they failed to deliver key issues that were of utmost importance to Republican voters. Broken campaign promises like: Repealing Obamacare. Obamacare took my families premium from $800 to over $2400. Funding and building a border wall. Rs funded all kinds of things for foreign countries but wouldn't build a wall for Americans Defunding Sanctuary cities. Rs funded cities who harbor illegal aliens. Defunding Planned Parenthood. During the first two years under Trump, Rs couldn't even defund that disgusting abortion mill. No, they funded it. That's the the one I really can't get over. Remember that big Omnibus that Trump was so angry over, the one that made us all furious? Trump said never put another bill like this across my desk and the Republicans gave our great President no other option. Republicans in Congress still don't understand they lost the House in '18 because of their failures to deliver what they campaigned on when they had the chance. It can not be overstated that when Republicans don't do what they say, they give no reason for people to support them. Along with millions of R voters, it was then that I realized that if Republicans can't accomplish the most important and easiest of campaign promises, when they held a strong majority with a President like Trump, then they never will. So I ran for Congress and here I am. I give speeches to hundreds to thousands of Republican voters every single week at home and all across the country. Our voters are fed up with Republicans in Congress doing nothing to stop Dictator Joe Biden and the outright destruction to our country. You see, Republicans have a razor thin minority in the House, only short a few votes. This puts maximum pressure on Pelosi to perform because she can't lose any votes, she needs her full conference to pass bills. And perform she does. I respect her for that. Easy to perform when Republicans in the House apply no real pressure even though Democrat bills are so heinously un-American. The Communist Democrat agenda could be beat if my colleagues would legislate and take action the way many give interviews on TV. "But Marjorie you're just a freshman, you don't understand how it's done." Really? The political pendulum has been swinging back & forth between Rs & Ds for decades & we're $30 trillion in debt, on the brink of communism, at risk of an economic collapse, and being drug into full dependence on a global economy, and the experienced Rs want to lecture me on how it's done? You all should hear what your wealthiest most successful donors are saying about you all and your lack of real action while Democrats burn our country to the ground with a dementia patient at the wheel. It's beyond me that my Conference still chooses to stay with the "messaging" and fundraising tactic to take back the House and haven't comprehended what everyone else on the planet knows to be true. We won't have a Constitution or country left to take back in '22 and definitely not in '24, if Republicans in Congress don't get their asses in gear. If Republicans are worth their weight in salt then they better wake up and realize that they are leaving their own with no confidence and feeling like they have to take matters in their own hands. Here is what must be done. Impeach Joe Biden. The GOP Conference must come together with Articles of Impeachment. Spend as much money as it takes to apply pressure on moderate Dems that know they will lose their seats if they vote NO on impeachment. For the Republicans who are rolling your eyes saying it can't be done, that exact attitude is everything wrong with our conference and your voters hate it. I witnessed 10 Rs vote to impeach President Trump and 11 Rs vote with Dems to kick me off committees. Those traitorous type votes are exactly why we fail and can't achieve our goals. Mock me and be angry at me all you want, but it's business as usual that fails. And even our enemies know it. We may be short only a few votes but Biden has burned his own voters and many in his party. We start with Biden and go down the list. They are ALL responsible and ALL impeachable. Republicans must take action or face the devastating reality of losing the trust and confidence of Republican voters going into '22, and many are already on the fence bc of the election and lack of real effort to fix it by elected Rs. Ever since I've been in Congress, I have legislated exactly the way I talk on TV and in speeches. Minority or majority should not matter. We should fight just as hard no matter what. Do what we say we are going to do and fight no matter what. After all that's what the 13 American soldiers did that Joe Biden killed. They followed orders and did the job they were told to do. Why can't Republicans in Congress do the same damn thing even if it looks hard? Here is what doesn't work. GOP Conference calls & meetings that are nothing but altar calls for money. Yes we have to raise money to take back the House, but I will no longer be silent about half of the 20 "Republicans" that are benefactors of all that money for re-election campaigns. The top 20 Republicans that the NRCC fights for contain 4 Republicans that voted to impeach Trump and 6 that voted to kick me off committees. And 1 did both. They call these moderate Republicans (or really some are Democrats in disguise) "majority makers." While yes we as a conference have to fight harder to win and keep tight districts, we should not promote weak Republicans to chairmanships, help pass their crappy bills, and highlight them on Fox News all the time. Those weak and moderate Republicans don't reflect the values of our base or our party. Why are they the ones diluting the decisions and stopping the fight? Hence back to where I started on why I ran for Congress, Republican failures to do what they said they would do. Since I have paid all $175,000 of my conference dues, I have every single right to talk about how the money should be spent. It should be spent on electing Republicans who will act like Republicans and not just play one on TV. Because in case you all weren't paying attention, Joe Biden went full dictator and said out loud that this was just step one. I've already submitted 4 different Articles of Impeachment on Joe Biden. I'm proud of my few colleagues who cosponsored and so are Republican voters all over America. But we are waiting on the rest of the conference to do what our voters are screaming for. I want more than anyone to take back the House in '22 and take it all in '24, but I also want my party to save this country from these old communists who radicalized decades ago to destroy it from within. Right now I have no confidence in the current leadership to do their job effectively to stop the Democrats unprecedented attack on our freedoms and our children's future because they are taking no action to prove it. They are the first to throw me under the bus even though the entire base and their own voters and donors support me. Prioritizing fundraising, press releases, and public messaging without organizing, communicating, and strategically planning with our conference to actually stop an extremely vulnerable and weak president is unbelievable to me. The Democrats impeached Trump for a phone call and a 3 hour riot and Biden is IMPEACHABLE for high crimes and treason. The Democrats want every Republican head on a platter and two feckless Republicans are on their witch hunt committee to make it happen and we can't even kick those 2 traitors out of our own conference! Yes I am breaking the 11th commandant and believe me I love Ronald Reagan. But I refuse to sit by silent and watch our constitution burned like a sacrifice to the false gods of Marxism and our children's future sliced up and served on a silver platter to Communist China. I'm going to continue my promise to put The People over the politicians and fight like hell to Save America! For America, Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA)" Paid for by Greene for Congress This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. Peter, I've been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about school closures. Now he's lying about whether or not he funded the gain of function research that led to the COVID-19.

HINT: He did.

Thousands of documents were already available to the public when I called Fauci out in a July hearing, but as of today, 900 more documents have been released to PROVE Dr. Fauci approved funding for gain of function research at the Wuhan Virology Lab. _(Yes, that one.)_
[**FIRE FAUCI: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307273:JIBRu12qN:m:1:3253819041:ECBDF65C0D48F16243473DAE867F4D0F:r)
The truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

He refused to retract his lies.

He didn't even bother to cover up the paper trail that proved him wrong!

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

Even the media-approved "experts" in microbiology are agreeing with ME now that Fauci was behind this whole pandemic. Richard Ebright, a molecular biologist at Rutgers, read the grants revealed this week and he says there's no DOUBT that Fauci was "untruthful" about his role in funding COVID-19.

_There you have it._

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bad news on Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Senator Manchin just said Democrats “will not have my vote” on the budget bill.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210912-2613-header&t=1&akid=2613%2E434096%2E4CLT9W)
Peter,
Joe Manchin just went on CNN just now to say that Senate Democrats “will not have my vote” on President Biden’s $3.5 trillion Build Back Better plan.
Seriously.
It’s a huge blow to the president’s agenda, and an even bigger blow to the working families of Pennsylvania and the USA who need our help.
**I believe Democrats should vote like Democrats.** If we don’t, we’ll be voting under the terms and policies set by Republicans.
**We **need** that 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate to get shit done.****I’ll be that guy — but only if we can run a strong enough campaign to flip PA blue.**
[Will you donate $5 to flip PA blue and lock in the 51st vote we need to pass these big and important policies? If you can, chip in now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29998?refcode=em20210912-2613&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2613%2E434096%2E4CLT9W)
Democrats have the House.
Democrats have the Senate.
Democrats have the White House.
Peter, if we don’t pass the stuff we got elected to pass right now, when **are** we going to pass it?
I promise you this. If you elect me, I will not patiently wait for 10 Republicans to hop on board before voting my conscience. I will vote to get stuff done.
[If that sounds good to you, please consider donating to my campaign today. Make a $5 contribution to flip PA blue and get 51 votes for our agenda.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29998?refcode=em20210912-2613&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2613%2E434096%2E4CLT9W)
— John

Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: It's time to repeal the Hyde Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
For too long, the discriminatory Hyde Amendment has prevented low-income people from receiving the reproductive health care they need by banning abortion coverage under government-funded health plans. Did you see our message about the Hyde Amendment, Peter?

For too long, the discriminatory Hyde Amendment has prevented low-income people from receiving the reproductive health care they need by banning abortion coverage under government-funded health plans.

Kim supports repealing the Hyde Amendment because she believes your income level shouldn't determine your ability to make the health care decisions that are best for you and your family. But she wants to know if you're with her in the fight for reproductive rights.

**[Add your name right away to stand with Kim and call on Congress to repeal the Hyde Amendment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35655411/305730015/123300065?gpsid=8_30_20395&ms=em21_210912_hyde2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210912_hyde2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210912_hyde2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTllMTEwNy0wNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5V7o8UqUMOGPuimYMWpgp6ozH47Qe5IxLSa9S17kOo=&emci=abd9b09d-9911-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6a9e1107-0414-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Team Schrier
Subject: One way Congress can protect reproductive rights:
Date: Thursday, September 9, 2021
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35655412/305730016/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTllMTEwNy0wNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5V7o8UqUMOGPuimYMWpgp6ozH47Qe5IxLSa9S17kOo=&emci=abd9b09d-9911-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6a9e1107-0414-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338) Team,

Republicans across the country are working overtime to prevent people from accessing the reproductive health care they need. Just last week, Texas' extreme six-week abortion ban went into effect after the Supreme Court refused to block it. It's only a matter of time before we see similar extreme anti-choice laws introduced in states across the country.

**We need to take action to protect reproductive rights before it's too late -- and one thing Congress can do right now is repeal the Hyde Amendment.**

The Hyde Amendment is discriminatory language which bans abortion coverage under government-funded health plans. This amendment has been included in every spending bill passed by Congress in recent history and has affected people across the country's ability to make their own reproductive health care decisions.

Earlier this year, Kim helped pass the first spending bill in 45 years that didn't include the Hyde Amendment. But after passing the House, **every Republican in the Senate voted to restore it.**

**[We need to end discrimination in women's reproductive health care decisions and that starts with repealing the Hyde Amendment. clean_body: For too long, the discriminatory Hyde Amendment has prevented low-income people from receiving the reproductive health care they need by banning abortion coverage under government-funded health plans. Did you see our message about the Hyde Amendment, Peter? For too long, the discriminatory Hyde Amendment has prevented low-income people from receiving the reproductive health care they need by banning abortion coverage under government-funded health plans. Kim supports repealing the Hyde Amendment because she believes your income level shouldn't determine your ability to make the health care decisions that are best for you and your family. But she wants to know if you're with her in the fight for reproductive rights. \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- Sender: Team Schrier Subject: One way Congress can protect reproductive rights: Date: Thursday, September 9, 2021 Team, Republicans across the country are working overtime to prevent people from accessing the reproductive health care they need. Just last week, Texas' extreme six-week abortion ban went into effect after the Supreme Court refused to block it. It's only a matter of time before we see similar extreme anti-choice laws introduced in states across the country. We need to take action to protect reproductive rights before it's too late -- and one thing Congress can do right now is repeal the Hyde Amendment. The Hyde Amendment is discriminatory language which bans abortion coverage under government-funded health plans. This amendment has been included in every spending bill passed by Congress in recent history and has affected people across the country's ability to make their own reproductive health care decisions. Earlier this year, Kim helped pass the first spending bill in 45 years that didn't include the Hyde Amendment. But after passing the House, every Republican in the Senate voted to restore it. | Every person deserves the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions, but for more than four decades, the Hyde Amendment has affected this right -- particularly for BIPOC and low-income people. As the only Democratic female doctor in Congress, Kim will always fight to ensure that every person has access to the reproductive health care they need. That's why she's taking a stand and demanding the repeal of the Hyde Amendment. Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? clean_body: Because President Trump hasn’t... | Joe Biden wants to distract you from his failures, Peter. Don’t let him get away with it. ❌ He’s wrecked our economy ❌ He’s caused skyrocketing inflation ❌ He’s surrendered to the Taliban ❌ He’s given up on our southern border That’s why Joe Biden refuses to take questions from the press (like President Trump did) and why he continues to propose new and ever-more extreme policies. He’s afraid that if he gives you a moment to think you’ll remember how terrile he is! Well we’re not going to let Americans forget, Peter. We’re going to fight every day to remind them of the Demcrats weakness, failures, and “America last” mindset. | | | | | | | | | | This campaign is a marathon, not a sprint, and we have momentum on our side. Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35656696/305735023/-2023814932?refcode=20210912.4_SA_9BV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYwYTMzMi0wODE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qw41es5u1nR4sBD7y3kkjVtDucXIrDZxTdb1a6i44WQ=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

Friend,

To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement.

Gavin Newsom has...

This is why we're fighting to recall Gavin Newsom, [**and we need your help.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65442%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fKwLoF7ObEtKkrjAjpEXXA&sysid=1)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0rv78fffaq4gqtfjgc1j3ec98gfv78h0j5jpmk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5ge0ob2chh2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjvn6ck93n69nv6ok8rp60jec0h9sniocec2oq70_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5ge0ob2chh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z52tlga1g5jffa4fg38md4bbpo6p04a0ln83eos0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c5ge0ob2chh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

clean_body: | | | Derek, FIRST , President Donald Trump created the Big Lie that he won the 2020 election. THEN , instead of refuting it, politicians like Gov. Ron DeSantis spread the Big Lie far and wide. NOW , you have the power to do something about DeSantis' anti-democratic actions. Charlie Crist is running to defeat Gov. DeSantis. As The Washington Post recently reported, “Dozens of candidates promoting the baseless notion that the election was rigged are seeking powerful statewide offices — such as governor , attorney general and secretary of state, which would give them authority over the administration of elections." DeSantis is one of the biggest culprits pushing the Big Lie, and he's damaging our nation and our democracy. We must remove him from office. \-- Team Crist | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . | Dear Patriot, I'm furious. Joe Biden just bypassed Congress and bypassed the Constitution to mandate vaccines for 2/3 of America's workforce -- by executive fiat. _Biden is out of control. He is behaving like a dictator._ There have been signs that he would attempt a power grab like this for quite a while now. In fact, just in the last couple of months, Joe Biden flat-out ignored a Supreme Court order about his illegal eviction moratorium -- and continued to mandate it anyway. _Now he has issued a tyrannical decree that will affect the lives of tens of millions of Americans._ Americans like you and I need to fight back now, or our freedoms will evaporate completely. I have led the fight against Fauci's illegal mask mandates and lockdowns, and I will be leading the fight against this as well. But I urgently need your help stopping Biden now. Will you stand with me? [Can you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately so that I can stop Biden's tyranny dead in its tracks?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DBprp_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7rqgUgLJWig6Mh7BJY7F2ZDrAZ1QvLnxR4COkFTQBuM7DFBpaivZx2InoOs6D3SxalOQ-2BXlzE0JLhHUWD5LNmVtuvZQErskW122J6vyX4U-2FDfgDb6dC56T5yYjRQSKXOxEaguwbyiVC5lsSiv07XEki-2F6X1kUZrc7P6TTqA-2FgoDGW4psrmHsaZjtM-2FDSd6qQZKd45Gd63-2FISNrYsF1jjBRxbXzsJBBRkOKggygUk6XeGicynGxJdNbCBZONKC-2FYbTXJCLqbwkuwCidg79c0YY3avnwLoTJzjElb5hipcg6Sew8zq2V4Qn6jrFHUaCy156YGlUsSZZkDhBDU0YJJo4TA-3D-3D) You've seen all the times that I've taken on Fauci in front of the United States Senate. That wasn't easy, and in fact I received a shocking number of attacks from the liberal media for doing it. But this fight to preserve America's freedom is so important to me, I am willing to take on any political risk necessary. The Constitution may be under attack right now, but I refuse to let it die. You've been by my side throughout so many of these fights. You and I have endured the most vicious attacks from the Left, but we have pressed on in defense of America's freedom. Once again, our nation is at a crossroads. And you and I must stand together against Joe Biden's tyranny, or our freedom may disappear entirely. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I'm furious. Joe Biden just bypassed Congress and bypassed the Constitution to mandate vaccines for 2/3 of America's workforce -- by executive fiat. Biden is out of control. He is behaving like a dictator. There have been signs that he would attempt a power grab like this for quite a while now. In fact, just in the last couple of months, Joe Biden flat-out ignored a Supreme Court order about his illegal eviction moratorium -- and continued to mandate it anyway. Now he has issued a tyrannical decree that will affect the lives of tens of millions of Americans. Americans like you and I need to fight back now, or our freedoms will evaporate completely. I have led the fight against Fauci's illegal mask mandates and lockdowns, and I will be leading the fight against this as well. But I urgently need your help stopping Biden now. Will you stand with me? You've seen all the times that I've taken on Fauci in front of the United States Senate. That wasn't easy, and in fact I received a shocking number of attacks from the liberal media for doing it. But this fight to preserve America's freedom is so important to me, I am willing to take on any political risk necessary. The Constitution may be under attack right now, but I refuse to let it die. You've been by my side throughout so many of these fights. You and I have endured the most vicious attacks from the Left, but we have pressed on in defense of America's freedom. Once again, our nation is at a crossroads. And you and I must stand together against Joe Biden's tyranny, or our freedom may disappear entirely. In Liberty, | | **** Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) P.S. Joe Biden just launched his most devastating attack on the Constitution yet. He has bypassed Congress entirely, and mandated vaccines for 2/3 of America's workforce by dictatorial fiat. America's freedom is in grave danger. I have led the fight against Fauci's illegal lockdowns and mask mandates. I will lead the fight against this shocking attack on the Constitution as well. But I need you to stand with me. | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

I’m sure you get all types of fundraising emails, but I’m coming to you straight today -- no tricks, no gimmicks.

Peter,

The fight to ban CRT continues, and things are really heating up.

_One Colorado father, Derrick Wilburn, bravely stood up against CRT at a local school board meeting._ After his powerful words, the school board voted 3-2 in favor of banning the instruction of CRT curriculum.

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307415:JgfiI12ZN:m:1:3253819041:327F70AEAF15ADFB59F6BA7C9FEA6013:r)
**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against CRT> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307415:JgfiI12ZN:m:1:3253819041:327F70AEAF15ADFB59F6BA7C9FEA6013:r)**
Supporters like you have helped us become a resource for parents and teachers across the nation who see CRT for what it really is: dangerous, Marxist indoctrination.

**The Teachers ' Unions are trying their best to silence us.** From supporting teachers who "vow to defy community demanded bans on CRT" all the way to hiding the CRT curriculum from parents and administrators, Teachers' Unions are determined to ruin the education system.

This is our chance to take the lead and leave CRT and the power-drunk Teachers' Unions behind. **Donate to PACT to help us defeat the Teachers Unions.**

**[CONTRIBUTE HERE to help us STOP crooked Teachers' Unions> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58307415:JgfiI12ZN:m:1:3253819041:327F70AEAF15ADFB59F6BA7C9FEA6013:r)**

subject: ICYMI: Governor Christie Points Direction for GOP at Ronald Reagan Library
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
### ICYMI: Governor Christie Points Direction for GOP at Ronald Reagan Library
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=666e2dd05d&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Onstage at the Reagan Library with Governor Chris Christie**

On Thursday night, Governor Chris Christie spoke at the Ronald Reagan Library in Simi Valley, California to address the future of the Republican Party. In his speech, the Governor addressed how the party needs come back after the election loss in 2020 and what its prospects are for the future.

[_You can watch Governor Chris Christie's inspirational speech here._](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=5e4e20d4d6&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
### See What Others Are Saying
---
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=09fa0a8928&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Axios AM**

**2024 watch: Christie's "hard truths" for GOP**

Chris Christie, returning to the same stage where he was begged to run for president 10 years ago, said in remarks at the Reagan Library:

_You already know what some professional political operatives are telling Republican politicians, don’t you? Pander to the lies and the liars, they say. ... Whatever you do, don't upset the truth deniers, the conspiracy propagandists, the QAnoners, the white supremacists and the wild extremists who are making so much noise these days. ... If not, they could easily come for you next.

If timid acceptance is the price of admission, we’re not the party we have always been._

[_Read Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=20e2089c20&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=3898944f0d&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**POLITICO**

**Christie steps out of Trump’s shadow — and stokes 2024 buzz**

Former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie is launching a comeback tour as he considers whether to mount a 2024 presidential bid that could put him on a collision course with Donald Trump.

The former governor is set to deliver a Thursday evening speech at the Ronald Reagan Library in Simi Valley, Calif. — a traditional waystation for GOP presidential aspirants — as part of a speaker series the organization is hosting that focuses on the future of the Republican Party. The high-profile appearance comes as Christie intensifies his political activities ahead of the 2022 midterm elections, with a book on the way, a new perch helping the GOP raise money, and plans to help the party flip control of the House next year.

[_Read Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=7e98d54fe1&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| | [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=890cc4bb51&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Forbes**

**Chris Christie Tells GOP To ‘Face The Realities’ Of Trump’s Loss And ‘Discredit The Extremists’**

[_Read Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=30c9c1fd0a&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=b6da5b5458&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Newsweek**

**Chris Christie Says GOP Needs to Cast Off QAnoners, White Supremacists and Conspiracies**

Former New Jersey Governor Chris Christie has said that the Republican Party needs to "discredit the extremists in our midsts," including QAnon believers, white supremacists and conspiracy theorists.

[_Read Here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=cbf04a415e&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=53c39557d7&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
| | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=2db782e0c1&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
| | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=00ef56bda1&e=65ae29fa7e)

name: American Update
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8754%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=xotWVHX9ttjn7OzrPhm0cA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03123%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EKOnQ1PPXp199bBPFlBW1A&sysid=1) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03124%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2fzI5xyWXjmhYMC38HaAcg&sysid=1 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03124%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2fzI5xyWXjmhYMC38HaAcg&sysid=1)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03124%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2fzI5xyWXjmhYMC38HaAcg&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s Second Amendment Survey because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it. That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to my U.S. Senate campaign today. This is an important moment for our team in Wisconsin, and we need your help. But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain the situation.

Ron Johnson isn't fighting for the issues that matter most to Wisconsin workers and families. In fact, he's too busy spouting dangerous conspiracy theories and writing laws to enrich himself, his campaign donors, and big corporations. The guy is only focused on himself and not the people he's supposed to be serving.

We're taking immediate action to defeat him. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, I hope you’ll consider adding a small donation today. Every contribution -- no matter how large or small -- will help our campaign build the early infrastructure we need to flip this seat and give folks a U.S. Senator who will actually fight for them.

**Will you make a donation to our campaign right away and help us stay on track for our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal? Senate control depends on our race right here in Wisconsin. That’s why your donation matters so much. Use this personalized link to add a donation of any amount meaningful to you:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-sept-21 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35662355/305752188/-623328154?gpsid=31_130_20376&refcode=em21_210912_mm1_fnd_gq_nondnr__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210912_mm1_fnd_gq_nondnr__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTlmZDYxYy0yNjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXiNwunMCqETzGzRfLrtYHB7LbcNldnp9Pv0UFOT1c8=)

I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I never will. The vast majority of our donations come from these emails, which is why they’re so important to our campaign.

This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion. We can do it again to put ourselves in a strong position to defeat Ron Johnson, expand the Senate majority, and give Wisconsin families leadership they can believe in.

Thank you for standing with me.

— Sarah Godlewski

P.S. If you've recently made a donation either online, at an event, or with a different email -- don't worry! We've received your donation and we update our online records regularly. Thank you so much for the support!

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Our chance to make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=827%2E3611125%2EOrNl4u ][IMG]

It’s opening day for the Browns, folks!

Did you know that I used to play quarterback for my high school football
team?

I was pretty good, but I wasn’t exactly Baker Mayfield, and an injury cut
my college career short. So, I found another way to represent Ohio and
make my hometown proud. I decided to run for office.

Playing football taught me that if you’re serious about winning, you need
a solid gameplan. And it’s pretty obvious what plays the GOP will try to
run to hold onto this Ohio Senate seat:

First, Mitch McConnell abuses the filibuster and blocks every stitch of
progress in the Senate. Then, he calls up all his wealthy friends to flood
our race with money. Next, the GOP will hammer us with nasty attacks and
vicious lies. Finally, in the fourth quarter, they’ll try to trick enough
voters to buy this Senate seat and keep it red.

Not on my watch.

Here’s my gameplan: We go to every corner of the Buckeye State and talk to
every last voter. We even the playing field to flip this open Senate seat
blue and expand our Democratic majority. And we make history by giving
Ohio two Democratic Senators for the first time in decades.

But as every athlete knows, that takes a team. And we’ll need the
strongest team our state has ever seen to fight back against my
millionaire GOP opponents and the billionaires backing them.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2694?t=1007&akid=827%2E3611125%2EOrNl4u ]So, can I count on you to join us in making history, flipping Ohio
blue, and expanding our Democratic Senate majority by rushing a donation
today? Every dollar counts.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2694?t=1008&akid=827%2E3611125%2EOrNl4u ]Donate

Time to go watch the Browns dominate Kansas City. Thanks so much for your
support.

Let’s win this.

-- Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2694?t=1009&akid=827%2E3611125%2EOrNl4u ]Highschool Tim football

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=827%2E3611125%2EOrNl4u ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=827%2E3611125%2EOrNl4u ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I’m sorry to bother you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35663275/305766562/-2023814932?refcode=20210912.6_TM_9BX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE3NzFkNy0yYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_O4-SqF8ljCQng5ewOVN6ASIA_FvE4SCV-IXFsvDeo=)

| | Derek,

I’m sorry to bother you on a weekend, but it’s important. Early voting starts this week and a recent poll _**shows my Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin ahead by 2 points.**_ It’s the first poll he’s led all campaign and it’s coming at an awful time.

Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear before Virginians start voting this Friday.

_**[Please contribute anything you can afford right now. Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35663276/305766592/-2023814932?refcode=20210912.6_TM_9BX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE3NzFkNy0yYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_O4-SqF8ljCQng5ewOVN6ASIA_FvE4SCV-IXFsvDeo=)**_

If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021.

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets.

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, I’m sorry to bother you on a weekend, but it’s important. Early voting starts this week and a recent poll shows my Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin ahead by 2 points. It’s the first poll he’s led all campaign and it’s coming at an awful time. Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear before Virginians start voting this Friday. = If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin three separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your time, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGiPQx4IeBPHiC2J4WX1jq9Cowy5W_Ev9BXFG8pSNIAhRfMRY8Mf6GHvclTEn2yLwvtN-NghoSNbRIu3NeyvzQ0bo-c8Eu6276Et6O-ziZnzQZdR6PDByUHQv09uB1BRqlckK27985qTjgMr0B0g_VSg5XdkHDUkwuTYNedyJ9AadOFdhYU_zJXpJjQ4OG_R-nDK8rFOaM5RLUHBayjwwFyHHnvT4XpzZ1UGlDt5PZNXQNw9onXV3NOFy3l9dCecmpH-fsbjzCSSReZhCgzt51dvsA63t-1wsUz5FoxqeeBK3/3f9/iFQgwBKyTNypDZHBX6qJpg/h0/X-yFZy1fu6EnK_vS2QBPNb8GEqkvC6_32l5Qty2S-Sg) Derek -- I’m falling dangerously short of what I need to raise to defend our Senate majority, so Common Good VA said I should reach out before my midnight fundraising deadline.

**[Please, will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us defend the Democratic Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGiPQx4IeBPHiC2J4WX1jq9CvBX39z5uR28T_77yLbJcSeXKvJLF-g0W8RbBnu_Y_xPUdW9LIDa9lxmIpxi571j7GdL-RKYqSgJerVJzdCCBhHvdgtE-9XyD4-8NWASbSg7I6C1_n2oeY7CgNlQsIu0LCLwHnP_9nop-1XpmbDeyGLJipLUcZU6bTXqXzeCeDtgLL31qwytRegPvGwTCw-yrgaGvZU9YOnfhskd2clRwckD16JSSiwfTmXnwJ32PMxFrIP4A_a8_7AuxfxUNQUmkPDW8_qqiNE5CN0FwO30oTdZnXrUHGb5xbmMRdrO1f4A/3f9/iFQgwBKyTNypDZHBX6qJpg/h1/oebbNzGI_iqPIU80F96fS4uNElcQkMUc1dxbb4AaONQ)** Let me explain why _your_ support is critically important, Derek.

Donald Trump just threw his “complete and total endorsement” behind my extremist opponent — one of his top allies who pushed voter fraud conspiracy theories to overturn the results of the election. And CNN is now calling Nevada a top pickup opportunity for Republicans, with the Cook Political Report _downgrading_ my chances of defending this seat.

The Senate Republican’s campaign arm just raised another $28 million that they could dump into battleground states like Nevada to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell – and I’m already being outspent by GOP outside groups: More than $1 million has been spent in attack ads to defeat me.

**[Nevada could decide control of the Senate, and Mitch McConnell is all in on flipping my seat, Derek. Please, can I count on you to split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help reach this critical goal to defend our razor-thin Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGiPQx4IeBPHiC2J4WX1jq9CvBX39z5uR28T_77yLbJcSD5V_h9i5Ny__Dd62IXhgXqIeFm2U4jNw1LtsZwKyUUHCR9Fa9fG6khyqDe4CuUibap_Yg6Jh848oP97i7dcUZMTIH48t-6KUjOg9d_B5FM2blFw_sLjWkEehlWfHUBE7pJzA8vl9ePBTxRTt7IVBshBitp08HOGntHiAmv71TjbAk8b1KnerumKVpXoBekhaCEbWHzZa1skOIXivA26A-M6nebN-KLJJMB4g7pclWZ1i0r7selsu7xSxyrUiaeW7hUbK_7GjxJU6yhp-ZGbQ-Q/3f9/iFQgwBKyTNypDZHBX6qJpg/h2/ZISA1Qcf97M3iTYBA7fHGhoXPh6255WN5619gfw2ic8)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGiPQx4IeBPHiC2J4WX1jq9CvBX39z5uR28T_77yLbJcSvLLUPhdZCvxcug6XdzObfV9sn0Y8yhwkSVEtA8HerzfVKjxmS4Fv28SQjtCFBCH0f99UPwm0YmXku6E0aqhiD-o8_3IAPwlwQT4Yt8Wd7IYuA4uii5SVhjLhSNvmld9wdax6I-z-SX0IZfIe-aQTmLgfaulRM2-8M2wQHU8sgBEg4rSTiwZJYr-mt1ls39Qv85uEsjPo9mMbIh12oSJoBt9TW123R_QEe5PAbfQgIcWqBaLRAIWVXxrTXsc6s219m6SpJ-22ZKggW7-u-zmr7Q/3f9/iFQgwBKyTNypDZHBX6qJpg/h3/f6zDPOh7gw6Q0mYXuxjIXmIBiy19lsClogqdKn9xTdY)

[ Donate other ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGiPQx4IeBPHiC2J4WX1jq9AXAOsUmzJ27jujXd99Bq4VcMTLxHhfKVPBs5BSrSRUVlWXyoCeVESLcP_JDZcW9rtib9Ds_KKTflUFEVLhtqhGLcbjlEcTvljQuLsiAxGecqgEOvL4U8GLeW00gponX-_ODJsrGjyG3bEHPCwBHJedLVJl4JmcH55--67hbFDawzv26Sumw4JGEt-uyqLGTgEMQv_eWS_99JDvLEF8B7WAdvo8Avk1pw_vB8IpCyOTnKf-NF127Y-hAS-_XP-96j-PgVAWeAuPBEy-ATYT7fD1/3f9/iFQgwBKyTNypDZHBX6qJpg/h6/Brb6wswcH2NEaFcDOe_W4TVUEeVu-XM94Tnb_SxlokQ) ** I narrowly won by just two points in 2016 when there was nearly $50 million spent to defeat me because of grassroots supporters stepping up when it mattered most.

With election analysts at CNN now tipping control of the Senate towards Republicans, it’s never been more important for grassroots supporters like you to step up, Derek.

**[Split a donation of $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA before midnight tonight to ensure we don’t let Mitch McConnell stop any chance of protecting choice, making progress on voting rights or any other of our shared values.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGiPQx4IeBPHiC2J4WX1jq9CvBX39z5uR28T_77yLbJcSmY6sZ9NrKFsVAaAyS05XLtwWYaJhAU8heqbD8uhvFJWwzGS2cHBZzZ6KHSYxUtZIv3wY2afi0th1bQAIsi2Fw4JW0_1m_N42bwq-pi2htHwAOmypUY-yxed3QKE1cj3sivfqIQTdlA7gPW0yk7htCmy22ZOv_medVrlhNQJGnlqyzoWWmkgKi_HZJKR4VGosnBd4I7QAkCLjW6wA-nbYnpCXVNLc8vnlucTdxjc2U_QyDFqma5VLghROl10rWbnUNcPv6QCep2KAxi68B-ew4Q/3f9/iFQgwBKyTNypDZHBX6qJpg/h7/PTZP-uimkOm7GBdUHSrrH2LaUT1hoO_xhFJe89HmLfs)**

Listen. Trump is making it his mission to flip as many states red as possible. And **Steve only won his race by just a little over four points!** And, in 2020, _Nevada went blue by an even _smaller_ margin of just over two points._
Do you see what we’re getting at here folks?
**This race is shaping up to be a lot closer than it was in 2018.** We can’t wait until a few days before Election Day to kick things into high gear, so we need your help.

clean_body: | | | | | Team, We just got news that Trump has endorsed the Republican running against Terry McAuliffe in Virginia... This really isn’t good news, folks. It’s clear: Donald Trump is trying hard to unseat every Democratic Governor. So, we need your help ASAP to protect Steve — are you in? | | | | | | | | | | | | | Listen. Trump is making it his mission to flip as many states red as possible. And Steve only won his race by just a little over four points! And, in 2020, Nevada went blue by an even smaller margin of just over two points. Do you see what we’re getting at here folks? This race is shaping up to be a lot closer than it was in 2018. We can’t wait until a few days before Election Day to kick things into high gear, so we need your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for making sure that we can keep this fight going strong. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Getting a lot of endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Election integrity train rolls forward |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=df710c9007&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

Wow. What a whirlwind couple of days. I’ve been wanting to write you sooner, but news bombshells keep dropping left and right. And I have news to report.

**Good things are happening, folks.**

My name is Mark Finchem, and I am in the vanguard of the Election Integrity movement. I paid for election hearings out of pocket when no one else would, I listened when so many turned their backs and covered their ears. I spoke up when others were afraid to be heard!
[***SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY IN ARIZONA!***](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4244b94409&e=44b8c466b0)
**And this has led to good things happening. Not only do we have bombshell reports with the Maricopa Audit (more on that later), but many proud Patriots have stepped up to support my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

_And I couldn’t be more honored._

**_[Can you help me today of $25, $50, $100, or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b8f06e837a&e=44b8c466b0)_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=157d650022&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Election integrity expert and former Army Captain, Seth Keshel, just endorsed my campaign for Congress!

He said:

_“Arizona needs a Secretary of State who will stand for election integrity and protection of the People’s voting franchise. That is why I am endorsing Mark Finchem for this crucial office. Mark Finchem has been on this from the start; the hearing he pulled together and chaired on November 30, 2020, was the first of its kind ever, and he has motivated other legislators around the nation to examine their elections as well. Mark is a team builder and as President Trump said he, “is a respected leader in Arizona.” Mark Finchem has my full support for Arizona Secretary of State.”_

Thank you Captain Keshel. I tremendously respect the work that you have done for Election Integrity and am honored to be part of such a historic moment with you. I will continue the fight as Secretary of State of Arizona!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=67fc00fc7a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Former Arizona Senate President Russel Pearce just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona! He said of me:

_“I strongly endorse Mark Finchem for Secretary of State. I have never worked with anyone more committed to doing the right thing, than Representative Mark Finchem. Representative Finchem is an unapologetic American. I take great pride and consider it an honor to have worked with Mark. I know Mark to be a Constitutional Conservative that honors that Sacred Oath of Office he swore to uphold. We must have warriors in the fight for liberty, and I know and trust Mark to stand up for our God given rights of Life, Liberty and Property. _

_I have worked with Mark on property rights, attempt to lower your taxes and nullify the federal government’s attempt to trample the state’s rights under the Constitution that clearly limits the federal government’s right to control or own property not expressly granted in the Constitution. I have watched Mark stand up loud and clear on election integrity. _

_I know Mark Finchem no-nonsense person who hits the ground running. Mark is a true Patriot and truly believes in We the People and this Republic_ _we are blessed to have. Mark leaves no doubt about who he is and what he believes. In today’s era these are qualities we must have in an elected official._

_ In this Biden era it is critical to have warriors in this time of the feds trying to stop voter integrity and_ _pervert and steal elections, we must have a strong powerful Secretary of State that stands up for Arizona and election integrity. I know Mark will be that warrior. _

_Please stand with me in vote for and support Mark Finchem for Secretary of State."_

Thank you sir! This means so much coming from a man I admire and have worked with for a long time. I will keep up the good fight, Russel!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1cb79fa794&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Senator Amanda Chase just endorsed my campaign! She said:

_“I am pleased to endorse Rep. Mark Finchem for Arizona Secretary of State. Mark Finchem was the first to take a stand for constituents when they believed something was wrong with the 2020 election. He has remained steadfast in his pursuit of election integrity, putting everything on the line for the People. We need more like him in crucial offices like Secretary of State.”_

Thank you Senator Chase. I am excited to see what happens in Virginia as you fight for Election Integrity in your state!

And last but not least, President Trump’s Attorney Jenna Ellis!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8f92bfa4dc&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **I am simultaneously honored and humbled by having such great patriots in support of our Campaign. I know how far we have come, but we have so much further to go, and we can’t do it without the support of Conservatives like you!**

[_Donate generously today to spread the Election Integrity movement in all 50 states and secure them with me as Secretary of State of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e84ae92e4&e=44b8c466b0)
**__I told you there was more good news__**
Friends, Patriots, and Conservatives. If you have known like I have from the beginning that there was fraud in the 2020 election, then you can feel absolutely validated.

**The results of the Maricopa County election canvas are in, and they are shameful. It is clear that, beyond a shadow of a doubt, the Democrats stole the election. This is why I am calling, officially, for a recall of the Arizona electors.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7a21ba3d84&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And what about the evidence? There is plenty more to come but let me give you a few highlights:

-The canvas includes 4,570 data points
-The canvas organizers estimate 173,104 votes submitted to Maricopa county were not counted.
-There was a missing vote rate of 34.23%.

**And this is just from one county.**

We need a 50 state audit NOW. This is a huge endeavor that I will very much be a part of, now and through my election to the Secretary of State of Arizona.

**This is a huge fight and[I cannot fight it without your help!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5d5045bbb5&e=44b8c466b0)**

[**_Donate TODAY to make a huge impact in election audits around the country!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79f3128b26&e=44b8c466b0)
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=187d2d4630&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=18eb9dad77&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I have a very important end-of-quarter deadline approaching at the end of this month where I must [raise $75k](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=365faa9f4a&e=44b8c466b0) to stay on target to defeat the Democrats in this Secretary of State race. [Will you contribute today to help me keep Arizona's elections secure?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4dd5e05299&e=44b8c466b0)

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=50c86c7059) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=50c86c7059).
---

name: Team Schmidt
subject: What a week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:

From Secretary of State Mike Pompeo to U.S. Senator Roger Marshall, Kansas’s top leaders are stepping Friend, **It’s been another great week for our campaign.** From Secretary of State Mike Pompeo to U.S. Senator Roger Marshall, Kansas’s top leaders are stepping up to support Derek Schmidt for Governor. **We wanted to recap the week for you, but also give you a chance to stand WITH these conservative leaders in support of Derek. ** [**We want to know that YOU are with us too – don’t delay! #

Senator Rosen said I could reach out because my race in Florida is most likely to determine Senate control, so I cannot fall behind on resources. Please, take a look at your supporter record:**
**SUPPORTER RECORD**

DONOR STATUS: **PENDING**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35666317/305780355/-2113423371?refcode=jr_em_nd_210912_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmFlZDg5NC00MjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3Jt-9wRP-BpgY0RFaWHX-9pQp07RtPW-mp60MJmh7Q=)**

If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell.
With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. Point-blank: that means hitting my September fundraising goal before the month is up. It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors.
**[I urgently need you to help me make up this shortfall before midnight. Val Demings
